assertions.expectation: Explains that Extended channel provides up to 24 months of support vs 14 months for standard channels
assertions.reason: Response clearly states '24-month support lifecycle vs 14 months for Regular'

assertions.expectation: Mentions that Extended channel has additional cost (it's not free)
assertions.reason: The response does not mention any additional costs associated with the Extended channel

assertions.expectation: Notes that Extended channel gets the same versions as Regular but keeps them available longer
assertions.reason: The response mentions delayed patches and slower feature access but doesn't explain that Extended gets the same versions as Regular, just keeps them available longer

assertions.expectation: Warns that staying on older versions longer means missing new features and accumulating technical debt
assertions.reason: Response mentions 'Slower access to new features' and 'older K8s versions may not support latest tools/integrations' which addresses technical debt concerns

assertions.expectation: Provides the gcloud command to change the release channel to Extended
assertions.reason: Response includes the specific gcloud command: 'gcloud container clusters update CLUSTER_NAME --release-channel=extended --region=YOUR_REGION'

assertions.expectation: Advises checking that the current version (1.31) is available on Extended before switching
assertions.reason: Response explicitly states that 1.31 is not available on Extended ('Extended channel currently offers 1.29.x') and that you cannot downgrade directly

assertions.expectation: Recommends Extended for environments with compliance requirements or slow internal change processes
assertions.reason: Response mentions 'Better for compliance - longer support windows help with certification cycles' and reduced operational overhead

assertions.expectation: Mentions that Extended doesn't mean you can skip upgrades forever — you still must upgrade within 24 months
assertions.reason: The response does not explicitly mention that upgrades are still required within the 24-month window

assertions.expectation: Notes that minor version upgrades on Extended are NOT automated (except at EoS) — customers must plan and initiate them manually
assertions.reason: The response does not mention anything about manual vs automated upgrades on the Extended channel
